text: Ever wondered why space is silent? Sound needs a medium to travel. Think air, water, or even solid objects. In space, there's a vacuum. No air, no medium. Without pressure waves, sound simply can’t exist. So, the next time you look at the stars, remember: silence reigns in the cosmos. Curious about more science myths? Hit that follow button!
